ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT OVALLE, ALEXANDRA

LAW AND MOTION, 302, THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING, AND RULED AS FOLLOWS. AS TO PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR ALEXANDRA OVALLE'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED. SHERIFF TO WITHHOLD $100.00 FROM THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR PER MONTH. THE AMOUNT OF $546.63 CURRENTLY HELD BY THE LEVYING OFFICER SHALL BE RETURNED TO JUDGMENT DEBTOR ALEXANDRA OVALLE. COURT TO SIGN AND MAIL OUT FORMAL ORDER TO PARTIES AND THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Oct-22-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Defendant/Judgment Debtor ALEXANDRA OVALLE, Tel No. 4150699-3502 appearing in pro per (Non-party JULIUS OVALLE also present);
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court modified its tentative ruling, and ruled as follows. As to PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC'S Hearing On Claim Of Exemption, Defendant/Judgment Debtor Alexandra Ovalle's Claim of Exemption is denied. Sheriff to withhold $100.00 from the Judgment Debtor per month. The amount of $546.63 currently held by the levying officer shall be returned to Judgment Debtor Alexandra Ovalle. Court to sign and mail out formal order to parties and the Sheriff's Office. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
